data.body: Pushed to Gerrit as change 795 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/795). Extracted new pure leaf src/rebar/llm/plan_review/det_lint.py (263 LOC, in [100,800]); det_floor.py 971 -> 746 LOC (<= 800 soft cap). Graduated det_floor off the module-size gate (removed from allowlist + ceilings; arch.md offenders row deleted). Widened the stale arch.md det_verify_lint.py seam to three islands (verify-lint + G5 decomposition-veto + task-DAG graph helpers) because the verify-lint cluster alone is sub-floor and left det_floor over cap. Validation: make lint clean; 140/140 named suites (test_module_size_contract, test_plan_review, test_g5_decomp_det, test_det_floor_operator_attested, test_det_invariants) pass; broader plan_review/pass1 sweep 376 passed. Awaiting Gerrit gates (LLM-Review + Verified); NOT submitting/closing per split playbook.
